title: centaurea koeieana
intro: Centaurea koeieana, also known as Koidzumaea or Koeie's knapweed, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, particularly in treating skin conditions and wounds. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable herb in folk medicine. Centaurea koeieana can be used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties for various health concerns.
